titleStmt.title: SII 25.143: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 143. (A.R. No. 143 of 1908.) KUḶḶAPUṞAM, PERIYAKULAM TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Sundararājaperumāḷ temple.
This inscription purports to be a copy of the order (tirumugam) referring to an iṟaiyili issued by the king (dēvar) in the month of Tai of the above year.

It registers the grant of 10 mā of land, with 5 mā each for the two flower-gardens Adigamaḻagiyaṉ-tirunandavaṉam and Añjādaperumāḷtirunandavaṉam, as kuḍinīṅgā-tirunandavaṉappuṟam, to god Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ. The lands of 10 mā measured by āṇmaiaḻagiyāṉkōl and the income from taxes like kaḍamai, iṟaivari, antarāyam, paḷḷichchandam, pāḍikāval, vaṇṇakkak-kūli, peruvari, etc., as śēsha (balance) were endowed for the rearing of the flower-gardens. The gift tirunandavaṉappuṟam was made over to the Śrīvaishṇavas of the temple of Aḻagiyamaṇavālapperumāḷ viz., Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷanambi of Iḍavai and Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ Tiruviḷakku Nārāyaṇa-nambi of Vaṅgippuṟam. The lands thus given, are located 5 mā below the tank of Kūḍalūr alias Rājachūḍāmaṇichaturvēdimaṅgalam in Aḷa-nāḍu and the other 5 mā at Kaṇṇaṉ-kuḷam. Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-nambi and Tiruviḷakku-Nārāyaṇaṉ are stated to have been looking after the two gardens respectively mentioned above.
The document is mentioned to have been attested by Aḻagiyaperumāḷ[Chokka]ṉ alias Āṇmai-aḻagiyāṉ Duvārapativēḷāṉ, Nāyaṉ-Viṉāyaka-bhaṭṭaṉ and Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ alias Duvārapati-brahmādirājaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāyk keḻvikku mel śrī komāṟa paṉ[ marāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkarava] ttikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭa co
ḻa purattu viramabhiṣekam paṇṇi yaruḷiya śrī sundara pāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉeḻāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭiyaṉ ṉetirāmā
ṇṭu taimāsam devar Iṟaiyili Iṭṭut tantaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi . Aruḷicceyal . Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyil periya
tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavaril Iṭavai Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa nampikkum vaṅkippuṟattu Iḷaiyāḻvān tiruviḷakku nārāyaṇa nampikkum Ivvaḻa
kiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ tirunaṉtavaṉappuṟam Aḻakiya maṇavāḷanampi ceykiṟa Atika maḻakiyāṉ tirunantavaṉattukkuk kuṭiniṅkāt tirunan
tavaṉappuṟamāka Aḷanāṭṭu kūṭalūrāṉa rājacūṭāmaṇi caturvvedi maṅkalattuk kuḷattiṉkiḻ nila mañcumāvum tiruviḷakku nārāyaṇa na
mpi ceykiṟa Aṉāñāta perumāḷ tirunantavaṉattukkuk kuṭiniṅkāt tirunantavaṉap puṟamāka kaṇṇaṉpaḷḷattil nilam Añcumāvum Āka Ā
ṇmai Aḻakiyāṉ kolāl Ēṟṟac curukka muṭpaṭa nilam pattumāvil Uḷḷa kaṭamai Iṟaivari Antarāyam paḷḷiccentam pāṭikāval vaṇṇakkak kū
li Uḷḷinta peruvari maṟṟumep peṟpaṭṭaṉavum Inantavaṉattukku śeṣamāka tantom Ippaṭi kaikkoṇṭu paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭaiittirunantavaṉa
ñ ceyka . Ippaṭi candrādityavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittukkoḷka . Ivai Aḻakapperumāḷ cokkaṉāṉa Āṇmai Aḻakiyāṉ tu
vārapati veḷā ṉeḻuttu Ivai nāyaṉ viṉāyaka paṭṭaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tuvārapati brahmātirājaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
